allow: Bash(curl -sL -o grammar/ApexLexer.g4 https://raw.githubusercontent.com/octoberswimmer/apexfmt/master/grammar/ApexLexer.g4 && curl -sL -o grammar/ApexParser.g4 https://raw.githubusercontent.com/octoberswimmer/apexfmt/master/grammar/ApexParser.g4 && curl -sL -o grammar/antlr-4.13.1-complete.jar https://raw.githubusercontent.com/octoberswimmer/apexfmt/master/grammar/antlr-4.13.1-complete.jar && echo "Downloads done" && wc -l grammar/ApexLexer.g4 grammar/ApexParser.g4 && ls -lh grammar/antlr-4.13.1-complete.jar)
Bash(chmod +x grammar/generate.sh && cd grammar && go generate ./...)
